case_title: ROMELIA CAMPOS VS. CALVIN LAPOTRE ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-22-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-08-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S HUSBAND SALVATORE CAMPOS INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROMELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CALVIN LAPOTRE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESNET. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROMELIA
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROMELIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-07-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CALVIN LAPOTRE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY CALVIN LAPOTRE ANDERSON SET FOR MAY-14-2010 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR FURTHER HEARING. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: $100 ON 1ST OF EVERY MONTH COMMENCING JUNE 1, 2010. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CAMPOS, ROMELIA AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CALVIN LAPOTRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-19-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-22-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CALVIN LAPOTRE HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROMELIA

THE MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF DEC-17-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. ORDER FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT IS TERMINATED. PLAINITFF SHALL FILE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AFTER TRIAL INDICATING ALL CREDITS DUE FOR PAYMENTS MADE BY DEFENDANT ON THE JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE RE:REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENTS(FILED:APR-19-10) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROMELIA AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CALVIN LAPOTRE

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY CALVIN LAPOTRE ANDERSON SET FOR SEP-17-2010 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-17-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. DEFENDANT SHALL CONTINUE TO PAY IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $100.00. DEFENDANT'S PAYMENTS MUST BE TIMELY. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH HIS INSTALLMENTS, HE SHALL BE IN DEFAULT, AND PLAINTIFF MAY APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING TO REQUEST ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $600.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $321.18 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CALVIN LAPOTRE
